evals.prompt: Is Resource.fyi worth submitting to? How does it compare to other directories for developer tools?
evals.expected_output: Explains Resource.fyi is a curated directory targeting developers and designers. Notes DR is unconfirmed and compares with known-DR directories.

assertions.name: audience
assertions.description: Identifies Resource.fyi's audience as developers, designers, and technical professionals, distinguishing it from general startup directories

assertions.name: dr_unknown
assertions.description: Notes that the DR and backlink type are unconfirmed, and recommends directories with known DR values for guaranteed backlink value

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares with at least one other directory like DevHunt, Product Hunt, or Uneed to provide context on relative value

evals.prompt: How do I submit my developer tool to Resource.fyi?
evals.expected_output: Walks through the submission process including social login, category selection, and editorial review.

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Mentions that account creation requires social login via Google or GitHub

assertions.name: categories
assertions.description: References the 25+ category structure and recommends picking the most specific category that matches the tool

assertions.name: review_process
assertions.description: Notes that submissions go through editorial review with no guaranteed timeline

evals.prompt: Where does Resource.fyi fit in a multi-directory launch strategy for a design tool?
evals.expected_output: Places Resource.fyi in Phase 3 (free editorial queues) and highlights the dev/designer audience as its unique value.

assertions.name: phase_placement
assertions.description: Places Resource.fyi in the free editorial queue phase rather than instant-listing or paid fast-track phases

assertions.name: audience_value
assertions.description: Highlights the developer/designer audience as Resource.fyi's unique differentiator compared to general startup directories

assertions.name: pair_with
assertions.description: Recommends pairing with other developer-focused directories like DevHunt, Product Hunt, or Peerlist for maximum visibility
